metadata.title: India EOR Services | Employer of Record India – Jackson & Frank
metadata.description: India EOR and Employer of Record India services. Hire employees in India without entity. Indian employment laws 2026, India payroll outsourcing, EPF ESI compliance, visa support. Onboard in 2–3 days. Book a demo.
keywords: hire employees in India without entity

faqs.title: India EOR FAQs
faqs.subtitle: Quick answers on cost, timeline, legal risks, and contracts for Employer of Record in India.

items.question: How much does India EOR cost?
items.answer: India EOR pricing typically includes a monthly management fee per employee plus the cost of salary, benefits, employer EPF (Employee Provident Fund), ESI (Employee State Insurance), and taxes. At Jackson & Frank we offer transparent pricing with no hidden fees. Total cost depends on headcount, salary levels, and benefits. Book a demo for a custom quote.

items.question: How fast can I hire someone in India with EOR?
items.answer: With Jackson & Frank India EOR, you can onboard new hires in 2–3 business days once we have signed contracts and employee details. No local entity (Private Limited/LLP) is required, so you avoid months of setup time.

items.question: What are the legal risks of hiring in India without an entity?
items.answer: When you use a compliant India EOR like Jackson & Frank, the EOR is the legal employer in India. They assume employment law, EPF/ESI, tax (TDS), GST, and compliance risk. You avoid misclassification, permanent establishment, and local registration issues as long as you work with a licensed, established provider.

items.question: What type of employment contract does India EOR use?
items.answer: Employees are hired under an Indian employment contract compliant with Indian labor laws (Industrial Disputes Act, Shops and Establishments Act), including notice periods, probation, leave entitlements, and mandatory EPF/ESI contributions. Jackson & Frank issues the contract from our Indian entity so it is fully local and enforceable.

items.question: Can you sponsor visas for India EOR employees?
items.answer: Yes. We support visa sponsorship and work permits (Employment Visa, Project Visa) in India, plus coordination with FRRO (Foreigners Regional Registration Office) and immigration authorities, so you can hire non-Indian talent through our India EOR.
